scripts.install-all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../server && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.admin: cd client && npm run dev -- --mode admin
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run admin"
scripts.build-admin: cd client && npm run build -- --mode admin
scripts.render-build: npm run install-all && npm run build-all
